name: Completed older-adult omega-3 venous-ulcer trial has no posted results
summary: The larger older-adult EPA+DHA chronic venous leg ulcer trial completed in December 2024, but ClinicalTrials.gov has no posted results in the current June 2, 2026 API view.
statement: NCT03576989 enrolled 296 adults aged 55 years and older with chronic venous leg ulcers and completed on December 18, 2024, but the current ClinicalTrials.gov API view shows hasResults=false, so it cannot yet support an efficacy upgrade.
population_or_model: Adults aged 55 years and older with chronic venous leg ulcers
time_horizon: Registry current as of June 2, 2026 API view
quantitative_note: Actual enrollment was 296; primary outcomes included lipid mediators, cytokines, PMN activation, proteases, and wound-area reduction over 12 weeks.
caveats: No results are posted in the current registry view.
Completion without results should be treated as a watch item, not positive or negative efficacy evidence.
The trial is disease-adjacent wound repair rather than broad healthy-aging repair.
